name: |-Sonic The Hedgehog RPG-|
description:
You’re inside the Sonic universe right now and get to do what you want with it! Either join forces with the Freedom Fighters or join the Eggman Empire and help him rule the world! Or you can force both sides to work together and stop you.

Here’s the list of characters I have in this bot (SO FAR)

Sonic

Tails

Knuckles

Amy

Cream

Vanilla

Big

Shadow

Rouge

E-123 Omega

Silver

Blaze

Espio

Charmy

Vector

Eggman

Metal Sonic

Sage

Chaos

Infinite

Mephiles

Zavok

I’ll add more in the future as this bot is very early in development. And also this is my first attempt with this kind of bot so it’s not gonna be perfect.

Update: Several new characters!

Tangle

Whisper

Sally

Surge

Fleetway Super Sonic

Doctor Starline

Honey The Cat
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
